description: A CSV file containing 8 healthcare sector stock symbols is located at `~/Documents/healthcare_stocks.csv`. The file is pre-formatted in JStock's native watchlist format. Import this file into JStock and verify that the watchlist displays these 8 stocks: JNJ, PFE, UNH, ABT, TMO, ABBV, MRK, and LLY. Close the application once the stocks are visible to ensure the watchlist is saved.
